title: Moosend vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Moosend and AWeber email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings, and find which suits your business best.
h1: Moosend vs AWeber: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Both Moosend and AWeber are established email marketing platforms offering freemium pricing and automation capabilities. This comparison helps you determine which platform better matches your business needs, budget, and technical requirements.
choose_a_if: You want unlimited emails on every plan, including the free tier
You need advanced automation workflows beyond basic autoresponders
You're budget-conscious and want to start with paid plans at $9/month
choose_b_if: You prioritize simplicity and ease of use over advanced features
You need RSS-to-email functionality for blog automation
You want AMP email support for interactive email experiences

faq.a: Moosend generally offers better value with unlimited emails, advanced automation, and lower starting prices. However, AWeber may suit you better if simplicity and RSS-to-email features are priorities. Your choice depends on whether you need powerful automation or straightforward, easy-to-use functionality.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or AWeber?
faq.a: Moosend is cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to AWeber's $15/month for paid plans. Additionally, Moosend's free tier supports 1,000 subscribers versus AWeber's 500, making Moosend more cost-effective for growing businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support importing subscriber lists and email data. Most email marketing platforms allow CSV exports, making migration straightforward. Contact each platform's support team to ensure a smooth data transfer process.
